system.flavor: You call upon the ancient and ferocious winds that swirled at the start of time, when the land was roiling and unformed.
system.effect:
Stance the following interrupt each round while in this stance.

Chaos Wind
Interrupt 2
Trigger character enters or exits a space in range 1-2.
Effect them with any other character in range, interrupting but not stopping their movement. Foes can save to avoid this effect, but are branded on a successful save.

Dominant [X]: If you swap a character onto lower ground than they started, then may fly 1d3 (allies) or you may push or pull them the same amount (enemy)
